description: Public and private group channels for team-wide or restricted conversations with membership, roles, and moderation controls

actors.name: Channel Member
actors.description: Authenticated user who belongs to the channel

actors.name: Channel Owner
actors.description: User who created the channel or has been granted owner role

actors.name: Channel Moderator
actors.description: User with moderation permissions within the channel

actors.name: Messaging System
actors.description: Handles room state, membership subscriptions, and event routing

transitions.description: Owner enables read-only mode to restrict posting
Owner re-enables posting for all members
Owner archives the channel; no new messages accepted
Owner archives the channel from read-only state

general: Public channels are discoverable and joinable by any authenticated user without invitation
Private channels are only visible to and joinable by members; membership requires an invitation from an existing member
A channel name must be unique within the system and may only contain alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores
Only owners and moderators may post in a read-only channel; regular members may react but not send messages
Muted users cannot send messages in any channel they have been muted in
Archived channels are read-only for all users; no new messages, reactions, or membership changes are accepted
Channel owners may assign moderator and owner roles to other members
Moderators may remove messages, mute members, and remove members from private channels
A channel requires at least one owner at all times; the last owner cannot leave without transferring ownership
Default channels automatically subscribe all new users upon account creation
A join code, when set, must be provided by any user attempting to join the channel directly
Broadcast channels allow only owners and moderators to post; members receive messages but cannot reply in the main channel

given: authenticated user submits a valid channel name

given.description: Channel name is not already taken

channel_created.result: Channel is created and the creator is subscribed as owner

given: user is authenticated and not already a member
channel is public, or user has received an invitation, or provides a valid join code
member_joined.result: User is subscribed to the channel and a join system message is posted

given: sender is an authenticated member of the channel
channel is not read-only, or sender has moderator or owner role
sender is not muted in the channel
message content or attachment is present
message_sent.result: Message is stored and broadcast to all channel members

given: actor is a moderator or owner
target user is a member of the channel
member_removed.result: User's subscription is removed and a system message is posted

given: channel is in active or read_only state
channel_archived.result: Channel is archived; all members see it as read-only

given.description: A channel with this name already exists

channel_name_taken.result: User is informed the channel name is already in use

given: user has not received an invitation and does not provide a valid join code
access_denied_private.result: User is informed they do not have access to this channel

given: sender does not have moderator or owner role
posting_restricted.result: User is informed they cannot post in a read-only channel

given: user attempts to post a message or modify membership
channel_archived_error.result: User is informed the channel is archived and no longer accepts changes

errors.message: A channel with that name already exists. Please choose a different name.
You do not have permission to access this channel.
This channel is read-only. Only moderators and owners may post messages.
This channel has been archived and no longer accepts new messages.

events.name: channel_messaging.channel_created
events.description: Fires when a new channel is created

events.name: channel_messaging.member_joined
events.description: Fires when a user joins a channel

events.name: channel_messaging.member_removed
events.description: Fires when a user is removed from or leaves a channel

events.name: channel_messaging.message_sent
events.description: Fires when a message is posted in a channel

events.name: channel_messaging.channel_archived
events.description: Fires when a channel is archived

related.reason: Shares the underlying message delivery and notification infrastructure
Allows members and moderators to edit or delete posted messages
Allows emoji reactions on channel messages
Allows threaded replies to messages within channels

goals.description: Create and maintain public and private channels with correct membership, moderation, and message delivery

success_metrics.measurement: Channel messages successfully broadcast / total messages posted
Messages posted by muted or unauthorized users / total post attempts

human_checkpoints: before archiving a channel with more than 100 members
before modifying default channels that auto-subscribe all users

invariants: private channels are never visible to non-members
read-only channels reject posts from regular members
archived channels reject all new messages and membership changes
a channel must always have at least one owner

acceptance_tests.given: a user without membership or invitation attempts to join a private channel
acceptance_tests.expect: CHANNEL_ACCESS_DENIED returned without revealing channel details

acceptance_tests.scenario: read-only channel blocks regular member post
acceptance_tests.given: channel is in read_only state and sender has member role

capabilities.description: Create, configure, archive, and manage membership in channels
Enforce owner, moderator, and member posting restrictions per channel state

tradeoffs.reason: message ordering and membership state must be consistent across all subscribers
